/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/Level.cpp.o -o game  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib/libraylib.dylib -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib -lraylib
